phase_completion.phase_1_run_loop: 98% (Full run loop implemented: hub, floor sequencer, exit entity, death/victory screens, meta save, biome-aware generation. Remaining: Load Game menu, Options menu, mid-run state persistence)
phase_completion.phase_2_combat: 100% (All 8 sub-phases complete: room metadata, enemy variety, biome config, encounter templates, loot tables, status effects, boss entity, boss arena)

roadmap_current_focus: DONE: Full run loop (StartRun, startFloor, advanceFloor, endRunDeath, endRunVictory in hub.go)
DONE: Death + Victory screens with run stats in deathscreen.go
DONE: Meta save (Remnants, RunCount, BestFloor, TotalKills saved to meta.json)
DONE: Biome-aware floor generation (runstate.go: availableBiomes, FloorContext, BuildFloorContext)
DONE: Enemy variety (7 behaviors: Roaming, Ambush, Patrol, Ranged, Swarm, Caster, Boss)
DONE: Encounter template system (8 templates, budget-based, room-aware)
DONE: Biome-aware loot tables with floor scaling
DONE: Status effects (Poison, Burn, Slow, Shield, Weaken, Haste)
DONE: Boss entity with multi-phase combat (Dungeon Guardian)
DONE: Boss arena with sealed room mechanics
DONE: Full death reset (items, equipment, stats, gold)
DONE: BFS exit placement crosses doors (IsPassable)
TODO: Mid-run state persistence (RunState not serialized; if game quits mid-run, run is lost)
NEXT: Phase 3 — NPC system, dialogue system, quest framework

fixed_bugs.title: Monsters visible through walls on previously-seen tiles
Boss could spawn inside a wall
Player items persisted after run death/victory
Monster AI followed breadcrumbs to player's old position
Exit always reachable without opening doors

team_notes: Single developer. Phase 1 run loop complete, Phase 2 (Enemy & Combat Depth) fully implemented. Combat is now a varied, biome-aware, template-driven system with 7 enemy behaviors, 8 encounter templates, biome-aware loot, status effects, and a multi-phase boss fight. Next: Phase 3 (NPCs & Dialogue).
